sidebar.tagline: Identity capture starter for auth, admin access, and the first multimodal workflow shell.
sidebar.footer: Auth, admin list, DB seed, and dev runtime are already wired.

home.heading: Solid enough to build the real persona flow without redoing the foundation later.
home.description: Auth, admin permission boundaries, Postgres wiring, React Router data APIs, and local dev orchestration are already aligned.

cards.authText: Sign up, login, logout, admin session checks, and seeded admin access are already connected.
cards.uiText: Tailwind + shadcn/ui is in place so the next screens can stay consistent without redoing primitives.
cards.nextText: The natural follow-up is interview input, media upload flow, and async generation orchestration.
